title: Mobile Player Input Handling
class_hierarchy: InputHandler owns BlockInventoryFragment inv, BlockConfigFragment config, PlanConfigFragment planConfig
InputHandler owns Seq<BuildPlan> selectPlans, linePlans, lastPlans
MobileInput owns boolean lineMode, schematicMode, rebuildMode, manualShooting, selecting, down
interaction_flow: TouchScreen → MobileInput: touchDown(screenX, screenY, pointer, button)
MobileInput [if schematicMode]: sets mode=schematicSelect or rebuildSelect, records lineStartX/Y
MobileInput [else]: tryTapPlayer(worldx, worldy) → droppingItem=true OR player.shooting=true
TouchScreen → MobileInput: tap(x, y, count, button)
MobileInput → Units: closestEnemy(team, x, y, 20f) → unit:Unit
MobileInput [if mode==placing, validPlace(), !checkOverlapPlacement()]: selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(x, y, rotation, block))
MobileInput → MobileInput: checkOverlapPlacement(x, y, block) → iterates selectPlans + unit.plans()
MobileInput [if mode==breaking, validBreak()]: selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(x, y))
MobileInput [if commandMode]: commandTap(x, y, queueCommandMode) → Call.commandUnits()
MobileInput [double-tap else]: checkConfigTap() OR tryBeginMine(cursor) OR tileTapped(linked.build)
MobileInput [Payloadc unit, target found]: payloadTarget = unit OR building OR Vec2
MobileInput [mode==placing, block!=null]: updateLine(lineStartX, lineStartY, cursor.x, cursor.y)
InputHandler.updateLine → iterateLine(x1,y1,x2,y2) → linePlans populated with BuildPlan[]
TouchScreen → MobileInput: pan(x, y, deltaX, deltaY)
MobileInput [selecting==true]: shifts selectPlans x/y by tile-snapped delta
TouchScreen → MobileInput: touchUp(screenX, screenY, pointer, button)
MobileInput [lineMode && mode==breaking]: removeSelection(lineStartX, lineStartY, tileX, tileY, true)
MobileInput [else]: tryDropItems(tile.build, worldX, worldY) [delegated to InputHandler]
MobileInput → MobileInput: selectUnitsRect() [command mode rect selection]
InputHandler [build accepts items, allowDeposit]: Call.transferInventory(player, build) [remote]
MobileInput [lineMode]: autoPan() + updateLine(lineStartX, lineStartY, lx, ly)
MobileInput → Units: invalidateTarget(target, unit, range) → clears stale target
MobileInput [payloadTarget, within 3f]: tryDropPayload() OR Call.requestBuildPayload() OR Call.requestUnitPayload()
MobileInput [autotarget]: Units.closestTarget(team, x, y, range) → target
key_relationships: MobileInput extends InputHandler (inherits selectPlans, linePlans, inv, config, planConfig, flushSelectPlans, tileTapped, tryDropItems, updateLine, tryBreakBlock, tryBeginMine, tryStopMine, tryTapPlayer, rebuildArea)
MobileInput depends_on Unit (unit.addBuild, unit.plans(), unit.mineTile, unit.aim, unit.movePref, unit.controlWeapons)
MobileInput depends_on Tile/Building (tileAt(), world.buildWorld(), build.interactable(), build.tapped())
MobileInput depends_on Block (block.size, block.rotate, block.onNewPlan, block.drawPlan, block.nextConfig)
MobileInput depends_on Call (static remote: tileTap, unitControl, buildingControlSelect, transferInventory, dropItem, requestBuildPayload, requestUnitPayload, requestDropPayload)
InputHandler owns BlockInventoryFragment (shows item inventory on tap)
InputHandler owns BlockConfigFragment (shows block config on tap)
InputHandler delegates item transfers to Call.transferInventory / Call.dropItem
important_notes: MobileInput uses PlaceMode enum (none/placing/breaking/schematicSelect/rebuildSelect) to gate all tap/build logic
checkOverlapPlacement(x, y, block): checks r1/r2 rect overlap against both selectPlans and player.unit().plans()
Line build mode: longPress → lineMode=true; update loop calls updateLine() on each frame; touchUp → flushSelectPlans(linePlans)
Area break mode: longPress in breaking mode → lineMode=true; touchUp → removeSelection()
Double-tap to control: first tap stores unitTapped/buildingTapped; second tap calls Call.unitControl or Call.buildingControlSelect
Item deposit flow: touchDown sets droppingItem=true (via tryTapPlayer), touchUp calls tryDropItems → Call.transferInventory or Call.dropItem
Payload handling: longPress assigns payloadTarget; updateMovement moves unit toward it and calls appropriate Call.request*Payload methods
autoPan() runs in update() when lineMode or schematicSelect/rebuildSelect is active — pans camera near screen edges
manualShooting enabled by longPress when mode==none (non-payload unit); disabled on touchUp
selectPlans can be shifted by panning gesture when selecting==true (tile was already in plan list on touchDown)
